seo.description: Café, Restaurant and Grillade Al Baraka in Sidi El Aidi – Settat. We offer Moroccan breakfast, mint tea, tajines, couscous and fresh grillades. Family atmosphere and friendly service. Order via WhatsApp.
descriptionVariants: Al Baraka Restaurant in Sidi El Aidi serves the tastiest authentic Moroccan dishes: tajines, couscous, grillades and delicious morning breakfast. Coffee and tea in a calm and comfortable atmosphere.
Café Restaurant Al Baraka à Sidi El Aidi, Settat. Moroccan breakfast, mint tea, tajines, couscous and fresh grillades. Family ambiance. Order on WhatsApp.
Family restaurant in Sidi El Aidi: slow-cooked tajines, royal couscous, kebabs and grillades, Moroccan coffee and mint tea. Traditional homemade cuisine.
Al Baraka Café Sidi El Aidi: coffee, mint tea, breakfast, eggs, msemen, harira, tajines and grillades – all delicious and reasonably priced.

jobsSection.title: Join our team
jobsSection.description: We are looking for people who want to work with us in the café – morning or evening shifts, with or without experience. What matters to us is the enthusiasm and commitment to serving customers well.

roles.title: Service and tables
roles.description: Welcome customers and serve tea, coffee and meals with a smile.

roles.description: Preparation and serving – no diploma required, just the willingness to learn.

roles.title: Cleaning and organisation
